title: quercus oocarpa
intro: Quercus oocarpa, also known as the Mexican oak or Ocote, is a species of deciduous tree in the family Fagaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Quercus oocarpa include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. The herbal preparation of Quercus oocarpa typically involves making a tea from its leaves, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
